message:
You know that friend who always seems to panic when the weather turns a little stormy? Yup, that’s my buddy Jake. The other day, as the clouds rolled in, he was pacing back and forth, checking his phone every five minutes. Meanwhile, my dog Daisy was just chilling on the couch, completely unfazed. 

I couldn’t help but chuckle and remind Jake that a little preparation can go a long way. We grabbed a few snacks, filled up our water bottles, and made sure we had a flashlight handy—just in case. It’s amazing how a little calm and a plan can turn a potential freak-out into a cozy evening indoors. 

By the way, I found this little refresher that helped us get our act together! Do you have a friend who tends to panic like Jake? What do you do to help them stay calm?
